value.found_quote: Auto memory: Notes Claude writes for itself based on your corrections and preferences, stored per git repository under `~/.claude/projects/`.
value.rationale: The page describes "Auto memory" as a real Claude Code offering and confirms it is stored within the .claude directory (under `~/.claude/projects/`). The `.claude` directory entry also lists auto memory as one of the things Claude Code reads from it. No indication of deprecation, so lifecycle is active.
